Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by the BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per the Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for us to initiate the work for this project.  

Please confirm your availability to receive the email related to this audit.  

Thank you for your cooperation.  

Best regards,
